rationale: SpaceX's public market debut is a major domestic financial event affecting US investors; China arresting a US academic is a fresh escalation in US-China tensions with real policy implications.

top_events.title: SpaceX IPO debuts on US markets, Musk becomes first trillionaire
top_events.summary: SpaceX going public is a landmark US financial event directly affecting American investors, retirement funds, and market sentiment; Musk's unprecedented wealth concentration has domestic political implications.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for espionage
top_events.summary: A US citizen detained by China for alleged espionage is a fresh escalation in bilateral tensions, raising concerns for Americans traveling to or working with China and signaling worsening relations.

top_events.title: Trump accuses Iran of leaking fake nuclear deal terms
top_events.summary: Public breakdown in US-Iran nuclear negotiations raises risk of deal collapse, which could spike oil prices and increase Middle East instability — indirect but real impact on US energy costs.
